ink-950.$description: Deep navy — darkest ink for backgrounds and inverse text

ink-800.$description: Dark navy — panel surfaces in dark mode

ink-700.$description: Mid navy — subtle borders in dark mode

ink-500.$description: Muted slate blue — borders on dark backgrounds (≥3:1 on ink surfaces)

paper-050.$description: Warm white — lightest paper for light backgrounds

paper-100.$description: Light parchment — secondary text in dark mode

paper-400.$description: Warm taupe — borders in light mode (≥3:1 on paper surfaces)

oak-black.$description: Oak brand 'black' — primary text colour in light mode

oak-green-500.$description: Oak brand green — primary accent (links, buttons) in light mode

oak-green-600.$description: Darker oak green — hover/active accent in light mode

mint-300.$description: Oak signature mint — accent surface colour in light mode

green-700.$description: Old Oak Green — accent surface colour in dark mode. Brand callback to early Oak sites.

oak-green-300.$description: Oak logo green family — primary accent in dark mode (8.00:1 on ink-950, 4.70:1 on ink-800)

oak-green-200.$description: Light oak green — hover/active accent in dark mode (9.18:1 on ink-950, 5.39:1 on ink-800)

sky-400.$description: Light blue — focus ring on dark backgrounds

sky-600.$description: Medium blue — focus ring on light backgrounds (≥3:1 on paper surfaces)

danger-300.$description: Soft salmon — error text on dark backgrounds (≥4.5:1 on ink surfaces)

danger-500.$description: Red — error states and destructive actions on light backgrounds

family-body.$description: Body typeface — Lexend (Oak brand). Shares the same typeface as family-display; kept as a separate seam for future typographic divergence.

family-display.$description: Display/heading typeface — Lexend (Oak brand). Intentionally the same as family-body for the current Oak brand; separate token preserved as a future divergence seam.

size-400.$description: Medium text — between body and heading

weight-light.$description: Light weight — Oak's default body weight (CSS font-weight: 300)

weight-bold.$description: Bold weight — Oak's emphasis weight for headings and strong text (CSS font-weight: 700)

line-height-400.$description: Comfortable line height for body text
